TestCase z18Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0) {
        int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to process, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    int max_val = follow_case.a[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] > max_val) {
            max_val = follow_case.a[i];
        }
    }
    // Replace a random element if its value is less than max_val
    // Use rand to select random index safely
    int rand_index = 0;
    if (follow_case.n > 1) {
        rand_index = rand() % follow_case.n;
    }
    if (follow_case.a[rand_index] < max_val) {
        follow_case.a[rand_index] = max_val;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
